allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $check = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($check\) { Write-Host "STILL: PID $\($check.OwningProcess\)"; $proc = Get-Process -Id $check.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($proc\) { Write-Host "Process: $\($proc.ProcessName\)" } else { Write-Host "Process is dead \(zombie listener\)" } } else { Write-Host "Port 8001 free" })
